other.content: Use explicit type annotations for variables to enhance code clarity, especially when moving type hints around in the code.

rules.rule: Whenever a TODO is added, there must always be an associated name or ticket with that TODO in the style of TODO(name): ... or TODO(1234): ...
For frontend changes (changes that touch the /web directory), make sure to enforce all standards described in the web/STANDARDS.md file.
Remove temporary debugging code before merging to production, especially tenant-specific debugging logs.
When hardcoding a boolean variable to a constant value, remove the variable entirely and clean up all places where it's used rather than just setting it to a constant.

Never raise HTTPException directly in business code. Use `raise OnyxError(OnyxErrorCode.XXX, "message")` from `onyx.error_handling.exceptions`. A global FastAPI exception handler converts OnyxError into structured JSON responses with {"error_code": "...", "message": "..."}. Error codes are defined in `onyx.error_handling.error_codes.OnyxErrorCode`. For upstream errors with dynamic HTTP status codes, use `status_code_override`: `raise OnyxError(OnyxErrorCode.BAD_GATEWAY, detail, status_code_override=upstream_status)`.

files.description: Best practices for contributing to the codebase
